financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made smart investments that helped it grow and make more money.
There were no major problems found in their financial reports, which is a good sign.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing well in managing risks but faces challenges with connecting new renewable projects, which might take a long time to solve.
They are improving fuel security by using more local coal, which helps them avoid unpredictable international coal prices.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job in taking care of the environment.
They have room to improve how they treat people and manage their leadership.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial performance and future plans.
They are optimistic about reaching their energy goals, even though they mentioned some challenges.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company gave clear answers about their spending plans but was vague about some project updates.
Most of their answers were backed by data, but not all future plans were clearly explained.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing very well and plans to grow even more by focusing on renewable energy.
Leaders are confident about the future, and they are fixing past issues to keep improving.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it's growing its renewable energy and making more money.
There are some risks because big spending plans might be hard to handle if things don't go as planned.
